rationale: The citation is not a passing background mention; it is tied to hypothesis development and experimental design. In the conceptual background, the authors explicitly invoke Sood and Keller (2012) to define direct-brand versus sub-brand architecture, then test this distinction in Study 3 with a similar manipulation. This prior work helps structure how the citing paper positions and operationalizes a core moderator of its proposed mechanism.
relation_description: The citing paper uses Sood and Keller (2012) as a key basis for its brand-architecture boundary condition, defining direct-brand versus sub-brand extensions and using that distinction to motivate H3 and Study 3. It adopts this naming-structure logic to explain when life-role-transition effects on distant extension evaluations should weaken.
